## Summary
- Update `/api/jobs` input-contract tests to match the new async worker kickoff behavior.
- Replace old fail-closed 503 expectations with the current contract: job creation returns 201 immediately while worker kickoff errors are handled asynchronously.

## Verification
- `npx jest --runTestsByPath tests/api/jobs-route-input-contract.test.ts tests/api/admin-proof-jobs-route-kickoff.test.ts tests/components/ManuscriptSubmissionForm.paste-performance.test.tsx tests/lib/evaluation/pipeline/shortFormSafeguards.test.ts --runInBand --verbose`
